rationale: Review 2's includeRight_apply finding (line 137) is a confirmed tautological rfl (def=Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight, lemma body identical) that Review 1 missed; dropping/fixing it produces a strictly better API surface. The three duplicate-Mathlib findings are real but contested (reasonable maintainers may prefer keeping thin specializations for map_*), so the net effect of acting on Review 2 is still cleaner without material loss.
